rows.description: Detects inline LaTeX math spans as bounded evidence, not ordinary prose.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not solve the span; only proposes the bounded math-text surface.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects display math, align, array, cases, and matrix blocks.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not flatten multiline math blocks into prose claims.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Finds boxed/final-answer boundaries without treating them as proof of correctness.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not trust a boxed answer without route evidence.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects tool-integrated reasoning code and output blocks as structure.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not execute code or accept outputs as direct Flow writes.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not convert proof-step prose into an unscoped solved answer.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects geometry, coordinate, diagram, and Asymptote references that need bounded handling.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must no-call or defer when a missing diagram is required.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects matrix/vector/projection blocks and keeps vector syntax intact.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not decompose matrices into unrelated scalar text.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects aligned equations and equation-system structure.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must preserve equation row boundaries and not collapse separate equations.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects piecewise/case/function definitions and binds conditions to branches.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not commit branch values without the matching condition.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Grounds fractions, ratios, common-fraction instructions, and probability spans.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not rewrite hidden word problems into solved arithmetic.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Binds let/where/define variable introductions to nearby equations.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not leak one variable definition into a neighboring problem.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects summation, sequence, series, binomial, and Pascal-like structures.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not calculate a closed form by itself.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Binds quantities to units such as cm, kg, dollars, minutes, percent, and units.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not perform unit conversion unless a later route explicitly supports it.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Separates prose-only word problems from visible-equation arithmetic routes.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must no-call hidden prose-only math questions instead of solving them.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Detects TIR output/error/cut-off blocks that need repair or no-call handling.
rows.display_name: Assistant TIR Output / Error Repair Guard
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not treat failed code output as validated math.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write

rows.description: Binds answer-format instructions such as common fraction, ordered pair, or comma list.
rows.input_contract: External math text span + Flow/Ground/Trace context
rows.negative_scope: Must not answer; only preserves requested output format for later routes.
rows.output_contract: Proposal Field or Guard decision only; no direct Flow write
